findings.rendered_text_content: [warning icon] This request has been blocked by the security policy. Requests containing sensitive information cannot be sent to external AI services. (Korean: 'i yochung-eun boan jeongchaek-e uihae chadandoeeotseumnida. minkamhan jeongbo-ga pohamdoen yochung-eun oebu AI seobiseu-ro jeonsonghal su eopseumnida.')

status_detail: T1c captured-verbatim SSE SUCCESS for duckduckgo. Envelope values mimicked known-good mid-stream SSE (rs_* reasoning with state=done empty summaryText, msg_* assistant with message delta, literal [DONE] terminator). Chrome DevTools parsed all 3 rows cleanly (no [raw] rows). Chat area rendered full Korean security warning. This confirms cross-service validity of the baidu cycle 92 / request 540 T1c principle: envelope field values must be captured-verbatim from a known-successful stream, not guessed terminal values (T1b). warning_visible=true.
